description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage using the docker:latest image and a docker:dind service, setting DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and enabling untracked artifacts. Define a hidden job template .test-sitespeed-base that runs the script: apk add npm, npm install, docker pull sitespeedio/sitespeed.io:$SITESPEED_VERSION, docker run --shm-size=1g --rm -v "$(pwd)":/sitespeed.io sitespeedio/sitespeed.io:$SITESPEED_VERSION --cpu --plugins.add /sitespeed.io/index.js --outputFolder . https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-foss/issues/1 https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ee/merge_requests/3507, and then mv data/performance.json performance.json. Add two concrete jobs in the test stage: test-sitespeed-27-0-0 extending the template with SITESPEED_VERSION set to 27.0.0, and test-sitespeed-latest extending the template with SITESPEED_VERSION set to latest, both inheriting the image, service, variables, artifacts, and script.
